configurations.name: school-management
runtimeArgs: & { $l = [System.Net.HttpListener]::new(); $l.Prefixes.Add('http://localhost:3000/'); $l.Start(); while($l.IsListening){ $ctx=$l.GetContext(); $req=$ctx.Request; $res=$ctx.Response; $path=Join-Path 'C:\Users\Tajmmul\OneDrive\Documents\claude ai\tataheer traders' ($req.RawUrl.TrimStart('/')); if(-not $path -or $path -eq 'C:\Users\Tajmmul\OneDrive\Documents\claude ai\tataheer traders\' ){$path='C:\Users\Tajmmul\OneDrive\Documents\claude ai\tataheer traders\school-management.html'}; if(Test-Path $path){ try { $buf=[System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($path); $res.SendChunked=$true; $res.OutputStream.Write($buf,0,$buf.Length) } catch {} };$res.OutputStream.Close() } }
